prediction.reasoning: This prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a common stochastic model for financial asset prices. The current price of NKE is $63.67. For the purpose of this prediction, an annual drift (expected return) of 10% and an annual volatility of 30% have been assumed, based on typical long-term historical performance and volatility for a large-cap stock. The prediction horizon is 20 trading days. The point estimate is the median of the log-normal distribution for the price in 20 days, and the confidence intervals are derived from the same distribution. It is crucial to understand that this is a theoretical model and actual stock prices can deviate significantly due to market news, company-specific events, economic changes, and other unpredictable factors. Stock market predictions carry inherent uncertainty, and these estimates should not be considered financial advice.
